description: Phase 14-15-16: Creator Economy & Monetization + Advanced Communication + World-Class UI/UX. Extends payments package with creator tools and marketplace. Adds E2E encryption and advanced messaging to realtime package. Extends shared-ui with design system foundations, accessibility, gesture handling, and micro-interactions.
steps: 1. Create packages/creator-economy/ with standard structure: package.json (@quant/creator-economy), tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/core/

2. In packages/creator-economy/src/types.ts: Define types for CreatorProfile, RevenueModel, SubscriptionTier, TipTransaction, VirtualCurrency, MarketplaceListing, CreatorAnalytics, PayoutSchedule, ContentLicense, MonetizationRule, AuctionConfig, RoyaltyConfig, BundleConfig

3. In packages/creator-economy/src/core/revenue-sharing.ts: Implement RevenueSharing class with configurable split ratios (platform/creator/referrer), tiered revenue sharing based on creator level, real-time earnings calculation with currency conversion, minimum payout threshold management, tax withholding estimation by jurisdiction, payout scheduling with configurable frequency

4. In packages/creator-economy/src/core/subscription-manager.ts: Implement SubscriptionManager class with tiered subscription plans (free/basic/premium/vip), grace periods and dunning management for failed payments, prorated upgrades/downgrades with credit calculation, subscriber-only content gating logic, trial period management with conversion tracking, family/group plan sharing

5. In packages/creator-economy/src/core/virtual-currency.ts: Implement VirtualCurrency class with in-app currency system (coins/tokens/gems), exchange rate management between real currency and virtual, gifting and tipping with transaction ledger, currency earning through engagement (watch time, content creation), anti-inflation mechanics (currency sinks, dynamic pricing), transaction history with double-entry bookkeeping

6. In packages/creator-economy/src/core/marketplace.ts: Implement Marketplace class with listing management (create/update/delist), search and discovery for marketplace items, pricing strategies (fixed/auction/pay-what-you-want), escrow system for secure transactions, review and rating aggregation with Wilson score, dispute resolution workflow state machine

7. In packages/creator-economy/src/core/creator-analytics.ts: Implement CreatorAnalytics class with earnings dashboard metrics (daily/weekly/monthly/all-time), audience demographics breakdown, content performance ranking, revenue per content item tracking, growth rate calculation with projections, best posting time analysis from engagement patterns
8. Create packages/encryption/ with standard structure: package.json (@quant/encryption), tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/core/

9. In packages/encryption/src/types.ts: Define types for KeyPair, EncryptedMessage, SessionKey, SignalProtocolState, PreKeyBundle, MessageKey, ChainKey, RatchetState, EncryptionConfig, KeyExchangeResult, GroupKey, SenderKey

10. In packages/encryption/src/core/double-ratchet.ts: Implement DoubleRatchet class based on Signal Protocol concepts: Diffie-Hellman ratchet key derivation (simulated with HKDF-like hash chaining), symmetric-key ratchet with message keys derived from chain keys, out-of-order message handling with skipped message key storage, header encryption for metadata protection, session initialization from pre-key bundles

11. In packages/encryption/src/core/group-encryption.ts: Implement GroupEncryption class with Sender Keys protocol pattern: per-member sender key distribution, key rotation on member removal, message fanout with single encryption per sender, forward secrecy through periodic ratchet advancement, member join/leave key management

12. In packages/encryption/src/core/key-management.ts: Implement KeyManagement class with key generation using secure random bytes, pre-key bundle creation and rotation, signed pre-key verification, one-time pre-key consumption tracking, identity key persistence and fingerprint generation (safety numbers), key backup and recovery with password-derived encryption
13. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/ directory - create new files for design system foundations:

14. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/design-tokens.ts: Implement DesignTokenSystem class with comprehensive token hierarchy (spacing: 4px base scale, typography: modular scale 1.25, colors: HSL-based with accessibility contrast checking, shadows: elevation system 0-5, borders: radius scale, motion: duration/easing tokens), token resolution with theme overrides, responsive token variants, CSS custom property generation

15. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/accessibility-engine.ts: Implement AccessibilityEngine class with WCAG AAA contrast ratio checker (minimum 7:1 for normal text, 4.5:1 for large), focus management system (trap/restore/ring visibility), screen reader announcement queue, reduced motion detection and fallbacks, keyboard navigation graph with roving tabindex, aria-live region manager, color blindness simulation (protanopia/deuteranopia/tritanopia transforms)

16. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/gesture-system.ts: Implement GestureSystem class with gesture recognizer state machine (possible/began/changed/ended/cancelled/failed), multi-touch tracking with touch point interpolation, gesture types: tap/double-tap/long-press/pan/pinch/rotate/swipe/edge-swipe, velocity calculation for momentum scrolling (using exponential decay), gesture conflict resolution with priority system, gesture recording and replay for testing

17. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/micro-interactions.ts: Implement MicroInteractionEngine class with interaction feedback patterns (button press scale, toggle slide, input focus glow), haptic feedback patterns (light/medium/heavy/success/error), state transition animations with interruptible timelines, loading state progressions (skeleton->content, spinner->complete), scroll-triggered animations with intersection observer patterns, parallax depth layers

18. In packages/shared-ui/src/core/responsive-system.ts: Implement ResponsiveSystem class with breakpoint manager (mobile: 0-767, tablet: 768-1023, desktop: 1024-1439, wide: 1440+), container queries support with fallback, fluid typography using clamp() calculations, responsive spacing scale, layout shift prevention with aspect ratio locks, adaptive component variants based on available space
19. Update all barrel exports (creator-economy/src/index.ts, encryption/src/index.ts, shared-ui/src/index.ts)
acceptance_criteria: packages/creator-economy/ exists with 5 core implementation files and proper types
packages/encryption/ exists with 3 core files implementing Signal Protocol-inspired encryption patterns
packages/shared-ui/src/core/ has 5 new files (design-tokens.ts, accessibility-engine.ts, gesture-system.ts, micro-interactions.ts, responsive-system.ts)
Creator economy implements real business logic (prorated billing, Wilson score, double-entry ledger)
Encryption implements real cryptographic patterns (ratchets, key derivation, chain keys) using hash-based simulation
UI system implements real formulas (WCAG contrast ratios, modular scales, gesture velocity physics)
Running pnpm turbo typecheck passes for all new and modified packages
